candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: After $t = 0$, each of the circuits in Figure (b) of the figure is source-free. Find expression for $v$ in each case for $t > 0$.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 在时刻 $t = 0$ 之后,图(b)中的每个电路都不存在电源。对于 $t > 0$ 的情况,求出电压 $V$ 的表达式。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The image is readable and clearly shows three circuit subfigures, so it is usable and necessary. However, the text is inconsistent: it mentions 'Figure (b)' but also says 'each of the circuits,' which suggests multiple cases, while only one answer expression is provided. A reviewer can understand the general circuit-transient task, but the exact intended subfigure/answer target is ambiguous.
